stemHtml: When descending at a constant TAS with power idle, what effect does the extension of trailing edge flaps have on the Rate Of Descent and the Descent Gradient compared with a clean configuration? The Rate Of Descent...

options.a: increases, and the Descent Angle decreases.
options.b: increases, and the Descent Angle increases.
options.c: decreases, and the Descent Angle decreases.
options.d: decreases, and the Descent Angle increases.
